product_prompt: a power tool that can break any cuffs

slots.prompt: Photorealistic image of a sleek, rugged power tool, the 'Cuffs Breaker', actively severing a metallic cuff on a workbench in a modern, well-lit workshop. Sparks fly, demonstrating its power and precision. Dynamic angle, focus on the tool and the breaking cuff, emphasizing raw strength and advanced engineering.

Close-up, photorealistic shot highlighting the 'Cuffs Breaker's' high-speed actuation mechanism. Motion blur subtly conveys rapid movement, perhaps showing a part of the tool moving incredibly fast. Sleek design details visible, emphasizing engineering prowess in a workshop setting.

Photorealistic image showcasing the ergonomic design of the 'Cuffs Breaker'. A gloved hand firmly grips the tool, demonstrating a comfortable and secure hold. The tool's contours and texture are highlighted, implying ease of use and reduced fatigue in a workshop environment.

Studio shot, photorealistic, of the 'Cuffs Breaker' alongside a diverse array of cuff types or interchangeable attachments, subtly arranged on a workshop bench. This illustrates its universal compatibility and adaptability to different scenarios. Clean, professional lighting accentuates variety.

Photorealistic image of the 'Cuffs Breaker' in a rugged, industrial workshop setting, perhaps with some minor wear and tear (but not damage) hinting at its durability. The tool's robust materials and solid build are prominent, conveying long-lasting performance and resilience under tough conditions.

Photorealistic close-up of a hand pressing a prominent, vibrant red button on a retro-styled 'Seinfeld Quoter Device.' A small screen on the device displays a classic Seinfeld quote, text clearly visible. The scene is brightly lit, conveying a quirky, humorous mood. The user's face is partially visible, showing amusement and engagement.

Vibrant and quirky icon: a retro-styled thought bubble with a lightning bolt inside, emanating from a stylized 'Seinfeld Quoter Device' silhouette. The lightning bolt signifies instant delivery of quotes. Bright, energetic colors on a clean background, conveying quick access and humor.

Vibrant and quirky icon: a vintage television set displaying a classic Seinfeld scene or logo, with a subtle glow, evoking nostalgia. The television is styled like a retro appliance. Bright, warm colors on a clean background, conveying a humorous and sentimental feeling.

Vibrant and quirky icon: a stylized, small retro button-maker 'Seinfeld Quoter Device' with a pair of wings or small wheels, indicating portability. The device is compact and easy to carry. Bright, playful colors on a clean background, emphasizing convenience and fun.

Vibrant and quirky icon: a retro-futuristic cloud symbol with a download arrow pointing into a stylized 'Seinfeld Quoter Device' silhouette, representing an endless stream of new quotes. Bright, imaginative colors on a clean background, conveying continuous content and quirky innovation.

product_prompt: A clothes warmer you put under your clothers, to warm you up, it also comes with an app to control the heating

slots.prompt: A serene and energetic person, dressed fashionably, enjoying a wide, immersive outdoor scene. They are subtly using a sleek, cutting-edge smartphone app to control their discreet clothes warmer, creating a visible 'personal cloud of warmth' around them. The lighting is warm and inviting, highlighting a sense of luxury and smart control. Photorealistic.

A close-up, photorealistic shot of a hand interacting with a sleek, cutting-edge smartphone displaying the clothes warmer app. The app interface prominently shows intuitive temperature control settings, illuminated by warm, inviting light. The background is softly blurred, suggesting an outdoor, luxurious environment.

A photorealistic shot of a person, exuding sleek luxury, confidently navigating a vast outdoor landscape as the sun sets with warm, inviting light. They are comfortably warm, implying extended use of the discreet, cutting-edge clothes warmer, showcasing its long-lasting battery life and portability.

A close-up, photorealistic macro shot highlighting the premium, sleek materials of the fashionable clothes warmer. Warm, inviting light accentuates the texture and quality, emphasizing its luxurious and cutting-edge design, possibly showing it discreetly integrated into clothing.

A photorealistic, warm & inviting close-up shot of hands discreetly placing the sleek, utilitarian clothes warmer inside clothing. The action suggests the 'before' aspect, leading to warmth, emphasizing its smart control and ease of use.

A photorealistic image with warm, inviting light showing a person's hands holding a smartphone, the screen displaying the clothes warmer app with active temperature control. A subtle visual cue, like a soft glow, connects the app to the discreet, cutting-edge warmer in the background, signifying smart control.

A photorealistic, wide outdoor scene under warm, inviting light, showing a person radiating serene energy. They are visibly comfortable, enveloped in a 'personal cloud of warmth' from their clothes warmer, showcasing the 'after' effect of the product in use, emphasizing luxury and comfort.

product_prompt: cloud services that store the servers high above earth usin balloons and solar panels

slots.alt: Abstract illustration of Sky Cloud stratospheric nodes
slots.prompt: Panoramic wide shot 3D illustration of sleek, minimalist white server balloons floating at the edge of space. Apple-style aesthetic with high-tech polished surfaces. Fluffy cumulus clouds below illuminated by a dramatic golden hour sunset. Color palette of deep space blue and neon glow. Awe-inspiring, futuristic mood, high contrast, purely scenic with no humans.

Clean 3D illustration of a sleek, minimalist solar panel array integrated into a stratospheric node. Futuristic Apple-style design with white polished textures. Dramatic golden hour lighting at the edge of space. Deep space blue background with neon gold energy accents. Focused on sustainable high-tech energy capture, purely mechanical.

3D minimalist illustration of a Sky Cloud pod floating serenely in the clear stratosphere. Far below, a dramatic storm with dark clouds and neon purple lightning highlights the disaster resilience of the platform. Deep space blue and neon color palette. Futuristic, calm, and secure mood. Apple-style sleek minimalism.

Sleek 3D illustration of a lone server node in the stratospheric sky, symbolizing data sovereignty. Polished white minimalist surfaces, glowing neon blue data rings forming a protective digital shield. High contrast lighting at the edge of space. Deep space blue background. Purely mechanical and isolated, Apple-style minimalism.

slots.alt: Technical diagram of the Sky Cloud downlink loop
slots.prompt: Clean flat vector technical diagram on a deep space blue background. Minimalist white and neon blue lines showing the data downlink loop between a sleek ground station and a stratospheric balloon node. High-tech, premium look, sophisticated thin line-art style with Apple-style technical clarity.
